name: Emergence London 2026
description: Tech Week event aggregator - bold, brutalist, network-driven aesthetic
rules: Network nodes use primary (#00D27F), secondary (#FFD600), or tertiary (#FF5733) colors
Buttons have 3px solid borders with ink (#251720)
Use mono font (JetBrains Mono) for dates, times, metadata
Maintain brutalist aesthetic - sharp edges, bold borders
Ink (#251720) is for text and borders only
